message:
chore(sqlite,pid,daemon): adjust visibility, add WAL verification, align formatting

Change SqliteLogger::connection() to pub(crate) visibility. Add WAL
mode verification in apply_pragmas (I12 audit pattern). Align comment
formatting in PID urgency thresholds. Minor formatting adjustments
in daemon loop and ballast manager.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
